title: Achievements
description: A proof of concept that turns Compet+ usage into a fun checklist for organizers.

toolbar.title: Two update modes
toolbar.description: Compet+ can feed this engine with domain events. FFTA Modules can resync by scanning the whole Ianseo/Compet+ database to consolidate multi-tournament achievements.

sections.checklistHelp: Milestones encourage using the full software instead of staying in the same three screens forever.
sections.scanHelp: Fast read-only scan. It targets all tournaments when the API supports it, then falls back to the active tournament.
sections.eventsHelp: Demo buttons emulate future Compet+ domain events. In Compet+, these would be emitted automatically.

events.empty: No event received yet. Click a demo event to unlock event-driven achievements.

totalCompetitions.title: Tournaments in Ianseo
totalCompetitions.description: Accumulate detected tournaments in this installation. The software starts having a past.

annualCompetition2026.title: 2026 season started
annualCompetition2026.description: Have at least one tournament dated in 2026. A vintage year deserves a badge.

entriesPerCompetition.title: Tournament scale
entriesPerCompetition.description: Reach archer thresholds in a single tournament: 10, 50 then 100 archers.

totalEntries.title: Archers managed overall
totalEntries.description: Accumulate registrations across all detected tournaments. The registration desk is getting stronger.

assignedTotal.title: Target assignments
assignedTotal.description: Accumulate archers assigned to targets. Field planning becomes a habit.

fieldPlanComplete.title: Complete field plan
fieldPlanComplete.description: Have at least one tournament where every archer is assigned. Clean work, no loose arrow in the spreadsheet.

scoresTotal.title: Scores entered
scoresTotal.description: Accumulate scored archers. Results mode is no longer decorative.

multiSession.title: Multi-session organizer
multiSession.description: Use at least two sessions in a tournament. Welcome to real-world scheduling.

allDivisions.title: Three bow styles
allDivisions.description: Manage at least three divisions in the same tournament. Classic, compound, barebow: the family photo.

clubCount.title: Interclub tournament
clubCount.description: Reach several clubs in a single tournament. This is no longer just Thursday night practice.

exportFederal.title: Federal export generated
exportFederal.description: Generate a federation-compatible export. The paperwork dragon has been defeated.

pdfGenerated.title: PDF generated
pdfGenerated.description: Generate at least one PDF document from the software.

recordWitnessed.title: Record witnessed
recordWitnessed.description: Detect or validate a record broken during the tournament. This deserves a tiny trumpet.

individualFinals.title: Individual finals launched
individualFinals.description: Use individual finals in a tournament. The scoreboard starts to sweat.

teamFinals.title: Team finals launched
teamFinals.description: Use team finals or team group phases. Collective chaos, properly organized.

liveEnabled.title: Live enabled
liveEnabled.description: Publish or enable live tournament data. Spectators enter the chat.

backupCreated.title: Safety first
backupCreated.description: Create a backup. Not glamorous, absolutely heroic.

restoreCompleted.title: Backup restored
restoreCompleted.description: Restore a backup. The panic button has a real purpose, and that is comforting.

mobileScoring.title: Mobile scoring enabled
mobileScoring.description: Use mobile or field scoring. Paper scorecards start feeling lonely.

sponsorsConfigured.title: Sponsors configured
sponsorsConfigured.description: Configure sponsor visibility. Clean, club-friendly, and useful for funding coffee.
